summary: Application entry point and orchestrator: handles CLI flags, config loading, Telegram client setup, message fetching/storage, TUI launch, and LLM-based summarization with adapter wrappers for service integration
side_effects: Parses CLI flags (config, channel, limit, debug, summarize, tui)
Instantiates Telegram client and authenticates via telegram.NewClient()
Calls LLM summarization on unsummarized messages
config_deps: Uses config.Load() to load Config struct
Depends on all sub-config types: TelegramConfig, StorageConfig, OpenRouterConfig, RefreshConfig, LLMConfig, SourceConfig
notes: Highest fan-out file (10 boundary packages). Classic orchestrator/wiring pattern. Two custom adapter types (registryRefreshAdapter, summarizeServiceAdapter) bridge boundary packages to TUI interfaces. buildLLMClient(ctx, cfg.LLM) is the central point for LLM provider setup (Ollama vs OpenRouter). Dual-mode: CLI-only fetch or interactive TUI with refresh/summarization.
